title: Disney Mickey Mouse Kids Pencil Case EVA Foam School Supplies Zipper Pen Holder
description:
This versatile Disney Mickey Mouse zipper pencil case features a sturdy exterior shell with a cute Mickey Mouse design! With its soft interior, your child’s contents and school supplies will be protected! It is lightweight your little one can easily transport their Mickey Mouse pencil case from class to class.
